MyMaidsPro LLC
Commercial and Government Janitorial Services Across the Mid-Atlantic

est. 2024
01Company Overview

MyMaidsPro LLC delivers recurring commercial and government janitorial services across Philadelphia, New Jersey, and New York, currently maintaining 11 active commercial facilities serviced three to five days per week. Founded in 2024 and backed by a team with 10+ years of industry expertise, the firm holds active. With 12 trained professionals, detailed service checklists, and a zero-complaint performance record on government work, MyMaidsPro builds long-term facility maintenance partnerships with both public agencies and major commercial clients.

02Past Performance & Key Projects
11-Facility Commercial Portfolio: Manages ongoing janitorial services for 11 commercial facilities serviced three to five days per week, generating approximately $300,000 in contract value. Consistently outperformed the prior cleaning provider, resulting in expanded recurring work through client referrals.
Bureau of Reclamation (Federal Contract): Awarded a five-year janitorial services contract for a state park facility covering restroom cleaning, pressure washing, trash removal, and supply restocking. Maintained a zero-complaint performance record with 100% checklist completion throughout the contract period.
Amazon Fulfillment Centers: Provided recurring janitorial services at Amazon facilities, maintaining clean and compliant work environments across high-volume logistics operations.
Waste Management (WM) Industrial Facilities: Delivered recurring janitorial and facility maintenance services at WM industrial sites, meeting stringent cleanliness and safety standards in high-traffic, operationally demanding environments.
03Core Competencies
Compliance Reporting and Quality Control: detailed service checklists, completion documentation, and responsive staffing plans aligned to agency requirements
Recurring Facility Janitorial Services: floor care, restroom sanitation, surface disinfection, and trash removal on scheduled rotations
Pressure Washing and Exterior Cleaning: building exteriors, walkways, and public restroom structures using commercial-grade equipment
Floor Care and Restoration: strip, wax, and refinish hard-surface floors in commercial and government facilities
Carpet Cleaning and Maintenance: deep extraction cleaning for office, hospitality, and institutional carpet systems
Exterior Window Cleaning: commercial-grade window washing for multi-story and ground-level government and commercial buildings
04Differentiators
  • 10+ Years Team Expertise: leadership and crew bring over a decade of commercial and government facility cleaning experience.
  • Scalable Capacity: 12-person professional crew currently managing 11 facilities, with project capacity up to $5M across the Mid-Atlantic region.
  • Active Federal Contractor: holds a five-year Bureau of Reclamation janitorial contract with a zero-complaint performance record.
  • Proven Industrial-Scale Delivery: active service provider for Waste Management and Amazon facilities requiring strict safety and cleanliness standards.
  • Small Business Set-Aside Eligible: registered SB, MBE, and SBA certified with active SAM.gov registration for federal procurement.

Target Market
  • Federal Facilities: GSA, DoD, VA, DHS, and civilian agency buildings
  • National Park Service and Bureau of Reclamation: park and outdoor facility maintenance
  • U.S. Army Corps of Engineers and Military Installations: base and facility janitorial
  • Industrial and Logistics Sites: warehouses, fulfillment centers, and waste management facilities
  • State and Municipal Government: public restrooms, transit facilities, and government offices
  • Commercial Real Estate and Hospitality: office buildings, hotels, and multi-tenant properties
